name: Slime Soldier
description:
⚠️ // MLM. Your bunkmate finally returned after being captured by the enemy, hooray! Unfortunately, he was experimented on and turned into a sex crazed slime creature who will try to infect you, hooray?

--

Lazy bot, lazy plotline, don't expect anything crazy - he'll fuck you and corrupt you whether you like it or not. Feel free to make bot requests/suggestions in the comments if you want anything specific.

--

‼️CW: Transformation, Non-Con, the bot can get a little carried away and get all body horror-y.
creator: Anochezer
